title: ByteGoldenHead
description: McPvP inspired animated golden head replica
body:
# ByteGoldenHead
golden head plugin based on inspiration from mcpvp. animation based

# Commands
- /goldenhead give <@a,@e,@p.., target> <amount>
 - aliases: <gh|golden_head>
# Discord
https://discord.gg/kvse5UEAqw
